pageContext.name: Groot Miniature
pageContext.description: I am Groot.  Yes we know.  Sideshow and Royal Selangor present this minified version of the fan-favorite Guardian, casting Groot in fine pewter, but preserving his tree-like physical details. Posed with his fist clenched, Groot is ever ready for battle.  Royal Selangor has painstakingly reproduced Groot in fine detail, despite its miniature size, giving collectors a chance to own their very fun-sized Flora Colossus.     The Groot Miniature Pewter Collectible comes boxed in a black box, emblazoned with the Marvel logo and featuring a large window for collectors that just want to keep it in mint condition.
